title: Sore Throat Basics
license_notes: Use as government source support for sore throat and antibiotic stewardship. Avoid implying CDC endorses local discharge wording.
supports: Most sore throats are caused by viruses and do not need antibiotics.
Strep throat is caused by group A Streptococcus and is treated differently from viral sore throat.
Patients should seek care for severe symptoms or concern for complications.
